economic_notes: Nation operates gas and grocery store, VLT operations, ATM and tobacco shop, gaming, restaurant, golf course, construction company, First Communications Inc., and Investment Group Inc. Loans receivable to KIIKO Pimataka Limited Partnership for algae/Astaxanthin facility in St. Francois Xavier; partnership had no development activity during year. Jack Pine Ranch property sold in March 2022 for $700,000 (subsequent event). Substantially all revenues from government sources.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED due to inability to verify fair value of loans receivable from KIIKO Pimataka Limited Partnership ($3,619,497). These loans are in arrears ($683,473) with no payments since August 2016; interest accrual suspended April 1, 2019. Financial statements dated August 23, 2022 for fiscal year ended March 31, 2020 — significant delay in audit completion. Large revenue increase in 2020 driven primarily by ISC funding jump from $26.9M to $41.5M and recognition of $3.07M deferred revenue from prior year. Segment expenses total $39,656,543 includes amortization; Schedule 1 operating expenses total $36,432,911 excludes amortization shown separately. No schedule of remuneration included. 13 consolidated entities listed. Construction in progress of $4,815,423 for flood housing and cultural centre projects.
warnings: Qualified audit opinion issued — financial statements may not fully reflect true position
